explanation: Smart-brevity rewrite of the linear.md production fixture: 174 words, no headings, concrete tease leads on each section, bullets for the multi-item Linear Agent section. Voice is release-notes throughout — `Linear Agent reaches outside Linear for context` beats the production `expanded its context reach via MCP`. Past tense ship verbs, descriptive present tense for ongoing behavior. One image inline, body ends on a concrete change.
